---
title: "RNA-SEQ"
subtitle: "Short-read RNA-seq + metagenomics tutorial pipeline."
date: "2024-03-01"
categories: [rna-seq, short-read, tutorial]
image: rnaseq.png
image-alt: "RNA-SEQ pipeline diagram"
---

A short-read metagenomics tutorial covering an RNA-seq pipeline.

<!-- TODO: add Colab/repo link and real cover image -->
